quote_form.heading: Tell us about your project
quote_form.description: Complete the form and we will prepare a WhatsApp message with all the details.
quote_form.success_note: WhatsApp will open with your information ready to send.

faqs.question: Do you have a minimum order?
faqs.answer: No. We accept single-piece orders as well as larger quantities.

faqs.question: Can I send my own logo or design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Send your logo, artwork or inspiration and we will review what is needed before production.

faqs.question: How long does an order take?
faqs.answer: Turnaround depends on the product, quantity and complexity. We confirm the estimated completion time before starting.

faqs.question: Do you work with businesses and organizations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve churches, schools, contractors, restaurants, barbershops, clothing brands, events and individuals.

business.tagline: You Name It. We Make It.
business.seo_description: Custom embroidery, apparel, hats, uniforms, drinkware and personalized products in Connecticut. No minimum orders.
